Growth AI · Organic Pages

Revenue at risk
1 page declining — $52K exposed
Rose Bouquets dropping in rankings (#2.1, down 4). Defend before revenue loss accelerates.
Content gaps
6 opportunities worth $254K
Priority: birthday flowers and fruit baskets — high search volume, no dedicated page yet.
Rank ≠ revenue
High rank, thin revenue
Flower Care Guide ranks #2 but earns only $9K — a top position that doesn't convert. Chase buying intent, not rankings.
Organic revenue & traffic · monthly
Revenue vs. traffic — do they move together?
$160K↑ from $42K · 12 mo
Left axis = visits · right axis = revenue · when revenue outpaces traffic, you’re converting better
Live · GSC + orders
RevenueTraffic
The correlationTraffic grew +233%, but revenue grew +281% — revenue is outpacing traffic, which means each visit is worth more than it was a year ago. You’re not just getting more visitors, you’re converting them better. The Oct pages and Valentine peak lifted both together.

If your top page disappears, you lose $89K/month — but 70% is spread across 22 pages, so no single point of failure.
